title: oxydectes timandroides
side_effects: Oxydectes timandroides can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, respiratory problems, and skin irritation in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to nausea, dizziness, and even neurological damage in extreme cases. Additionally, improper handling and processing of the plant can result in eye infections and digestive issues. It is essential to exercise caution and consult medical professionals before using the oxydectes timandroides plant for medicinal purposes.
